    1. findByIdempotencyKey(String)

Interface SpringDataTransactionRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<TransactionJpaEntity, UUID>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<TransactionJpaEntity, UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<TransactionJpaEntity, UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<TransactionJpaEntity, UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<TransactionJpaEntity, UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<TransactionJpaEntity>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<TransactionJpaEntity, UUID>
public interface SpringDataTransactionRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<TransactionJpaEntity, UUID>
Spring Data JPA repository for TransactionJpaEntity.

  • Method Details

    • findByIdempotencyKey

      Optional<TransactionJpaEntity> findByIdempotencyKey(String idempotencyKey)
      Finds the transaction associated with the given idempotency key.

      Used to retrieve and return the original transaction result during an idempotent replay request.

      Parameters:
      idempotencyKey - the idempotency key to search by
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the matching entity, or empty if not found
